title: Don Bosco Tech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Don Bosco Tech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Don Bosco Tech family as a Subject Matter Expert in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Don Bosco Tech:
Don Bosco Tech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Don Bosco Tech!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
